text: Stepping into this brightly lit and modern space, I feel a sense of expectation as if on the cusp of new ideas. The glass and clean lines make the environment feel transparent and open. Inside, the vivid display labeled 'R + D' invites me to ponder human development and innovation. Curiosity flickers within me; I am compelled to slow down and engage thoughtfully with the exhibits, inspired by the theme of connection and coexistence. There is both a gentle invitation to reflect and a certain awe at the collective pursuit of knowledge surrounding me.
